app.title: agentboard
app.offline: Agentboard server unreachable. Run `/agentboard:open` in Claude Code.

common.confirm_delete: Delete task {{code}}? Any running agents will be cancelled.

catalog.local_note: Stored locally in this browser until the server adds a catalog API.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: All recorded AI coding sessions.
sessions.empty_body: context-mode has not written any session databases yet. Expected dir:

event_desc.SessionStart: Session booted. Startup hooks run here and inject context (CLAUDE.md, caveman mode, etc.) before Claude sees anything.
event_desc.SessionEnd: Session terminated. Cleanup hooks fire; next prompt begins a fresh session.
event_desc.UserPromptSubmit: User submitted a prompt. Hooks can transform, enrich, or block the message before Claude reads it.
event_desc.PreToolUse: Claude is about to invoke a tool. Hooks can approve, deny, or inject guardrails before execution.
event_desc.PostToolUse: Tool finished. Hooks observe stdout/result and may auto-lint, capture context, or react.
event_desc.Notification: System or Claude notification (permission prompt, status update). No model turn is consumed.
event_desc.Stop: Main agent produced its final response. Stop hooks fire before the turn closes.
event_desc.SubagentStop: A Task subagent finished. Its output returns to the main agent; the subagent's context is discarded.
event_desc.PreCompact: Conversation is about to be compacted (auto near context limit or via /compact). Hooks can persist state first.
event_desc.Compact: Compaction just happened. Older messages were summarized; conversation continues on the summary.
event_desc.hook_started: A hook process started executing. context-mode records this to measure hook latency.
event_desc.hook_response: Hook finished and returned output (stdin-injected context or stdout) to the session.
event_desc.file_read: Claude read a file (Read tool). The path joins the session's read-file set.
event_desc.file_write: Claude created a new file (Write tool).
event_desc.file_edit: Claude modified an existing file (Edit or NotebookEdit tool).
event_desc.file_glob: Claude searched for files by name pattern (Glob tool).
event_desc.file_search: Claude searched file contents by regex (Grep tool).
event_desc.rule: Claude read a rule file — CLAUDE.md or anything under `.claude/`. Rule sources anchor project conventions.
event_desc.rule_content: Full body of a rule file, captured verbatim so resume snapshots can re-inject it.
event_desc.cwd: Claude changed working directory inside a Bash call (`cd <dir>`).
event_desc.error_tool: A tool invocation failed (non-zero exit, `error`/`FAIL` in output, or isError=true).
event_desc.git: Git operation run via Bash (commit, checkout, push, diff, etc.). `data` holds the operation.
event_desc.env: Bash command that mutated the shell environment (activate, export, npm/pip/cargo install…). Secrets in `export VAR=…` are masked.
event_desc.task: A todo item was written via TodoWrite.
event_desc.task_create: A task was created via TaskCreate (agent-task ledger).
event_desc.task_update: A task was updated via TaskUpdate (status, owner, description).
event_desc.plan_enter: Claude entered plan mode — read-only exploration + plan-file edits only.
event_desc.plan_exit: Claude left plan mode, usually after writing a plan file. Awaiting user approval.
event_desc.plan_approved: User approved the plan. Implementation can proceed.
event_desc.plan_rejected: User rejected the plan. Claude rethinks or abandons.
event_desc.plan_file_write: Claude wrote a plan file under `.claude/plans/`.
event_desc.skill: Claude invoked a skill (markdown instruction pack).
event_desc.subagent_launched: Claude spawned a subagent via the Agent / Task tool.
event_desc.subagent_completed: A subagent returned its result to the main agent; its context is discarded.
event_desc.mcp: Claude called an MCP tool (external Model Context Protocol server).
event_desc.decision_question: Claude asked the user via AskUserQuestion. Records the chosen answer.
event_desc.worktree: Claude entered a git worktree (isolated branch copy).
event_desc.user_prompt: User submitted a prompt. Raw text is stored for resume snapshots.
event_desc.decision: User prompt contained a directive (`don't`, `instead`, `prefer`…). Treated as sticky guidance.
event_desc.role: User set a persona (`act as senior engineer`, `you are…`). Stable role for the session.
event_desc.intent: Session-level intent classified from the prompt: investigate | implement | discuss | review.
event_desc.data: Prompt longer than ~1 KB captured as raw data (pasted logs, dumps).

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Pick a palette and colour scheme. Applied instantly, persisted per browser.

settings.title: Project settings
settings.name: Name
settings.code_locked: Immutable — task codes + DB filename locked to this value
settings.repo_hint: Absolute path. Worker edits files under this directory.
settings.max_parallel_hint: 1–3. Concurrent agent runs for this project.
settings.version_mismatch: Project was modified elsewhere — reload and retry.

wizard.name: Project name
wizard.code_hint: 2–7 uppercase letters/digits. Each task will be prefixed with this code (e.g. {{code}}-1).
wizard.wf1: Todo → Agent Working → Agent Review → Human Approval → Done
wizard.wf2: Todo → Agent Working → Human Approval → Done
wizard.repo_hint: Absolute path to the code repo the Worker agent will edit.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Reusable abilities you can attach to a role or run.
skills.detail_subtitle: Edit how this skill shows up when attached to a role or run.
skills.name: Name
skills.emblem_hint: 1–3 character monogram shown on the card.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Agent personas that act on your tasks.
roles.detail_subtitle: Edit this agent persona and the skills it is allowed to use.
roles.name: Name
roles.skills_hint: Tap to toggle. These appear on the role card and influence dispatch.

project.title: Project
project.subtitle: Settings, repo path, and dispatch limits.

task.reject_prompt: Tell Worker what to change (min 10 chars)
